dungeon: GENUINE ROTF edited episodic compilation ('PREVIOUSLY ON AVALAR...' title card) by player RuinedBow. HIGH yield: 2 clear NEW boss arenas with verbatim taunts (The Twisted Memory, The Weather God) + a documented ROTF-custom Oryx HP-ANNOUNCE taunt system + 2 partial boss leads (Euryale the Snake Goddess, Ascended Sepiseus the Ghost Goddess) + event/death-cause name leads (Frost Guardian, Wizard of Evil Souls XP10). Edited cuts -> attacks mostly approximate.
map: DOCUMENTED-from-transitions+minimaps (per boss): (1) THE WEATHER GOD's PALACE = a STRUCTURED grey-walled fortress — rectangular rooms + connecting CORRIDORS + a central long RED-FLOORED chamber, ringed by a BLUE-WATER moat (minimap 5/15); teal/cyan interior floor with pillar marks. Choke-point corridors between rooms ('Infiltrating my palace'). (2) THE TWISTED MEMORY = a small round BLUE/TEAL watery cavern (single blobby arena, minimap blob). (3) ORYX chamber = a brown/tan CASTLE arena, roughly circular with a dark center (bossend b002). Multi-dungeon edit; no single contiguous layout.

bosses.name: Oryx the Mad God (ROTF-custom HP-announce taunts)
attacks: DOCUMENTED-from-frames (b002@130s climax frame 1): a RADIAL RING/NOVA of orange/red bullets (concentric rings) in the circular castle arena.
taunts: I own this realm, I WILL DESTROY YOU...
Puny mortals! My 39540 HP will annihilate...
Puny mortals! My 123232 HP will annihilate...
Puny mortals! My 41915 HP will annihilate...
bosses.note: DOCUMENTED-from-chat (boss-coloured 'Oryx the Mad God'). Oryx is BASE-GAME, but these taunts are a ROTF-CUSTOM DYNAMIC-HP ANNOUNCE system: the line states Oryx's LIVE current HP (39540 / 123232 / 41915 across frames). 'I own this realm, I WILL DESTROY YOU...' + 'Puny mortals! My <currentHP> HP will annihilate...' are right-cut. Documented as a custom Oryx-taunt MECHANIC, NOT claimed as a new boss. Radial-nova attack traced from b002.

mechanics: DOCUMENTED ROTF-CUSTOM SYSTEMS: (1) ORYX DYNAMIC-HP ANNOUNCE taunt — 'Puny mortals! My <currentHP> HP will annihilate...' states Oryx's live HP (39540/123232/41915). (2) CRAFTING-MATERIAL drop economy — bosses drop named crafting materials ('Piece of the Realm', 'Ancient Fire [Crystal]', 'Aspect of Vamp[ire]') with a per-player 'with X% damage deal' contribution tag. (3) MARKETPLACE + FRAGMENT/MARK currency (sell-for-gold + 'gained 1 fragment, you have X marks'). (4) XP## EPIC-TIER enemy suffix (Wizard of Evil Souls XP10). (5) Weather God SHRINE-power phase ('SHRINE WILL GIVE ME POWER!'). Edited episodic series ('PREVIOUSLY ON AVALAR...').
